hero.badge: Lead Generation & Funnel Building — For Service Businesses
hero.headline3: We Build the System That Finds Them.
hero.subtext: Stop depending on referrals and luck. We engineer a complete acquisition system — market research, funnel strategy, landing pages, and paid ads — so qualified clients come to you, every single month.
hero.check1: Paid Ads — Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn

problem.label: Why Most Service Businesses Struggle
problem.headline: The problem isn't your service — it's your system
problem.subtext: If any of these sound familiar, you're leaving money on the table every single month
problem.card1Text: One great month, then silence. Without a system generating leads consistently, you can't plan, hire, or grow with confidence.
problem.card2Text: Referrals feel safe — but you can't control them, you can't scale them, and one slow season can put your entire business at risk.
problem.card3Text: Running ads without a funnel or a clear message is like pouring water into a broken bucket. The budget disappears. The leads don't.

services.label: What We Build For You
services.headline: A complete system — not just ads
services.subtext: Every piece is engineered to work together. Remove one and the whole system underperforms.
services.s1Text: We start by understanding your market deeply — who your ideal client is, what they fear, what they want, and how your competitors are positioned.
services.s2Text: We architect the complete client journey — from the first ad impression to the moment they're ready to buy. No guesswork, just a system.
services.s3Text: Before we write a single ad, we craft the message that makes your ideal client stop, read, and feel understood. This is where most businesses fail.
services.s4Text: Scroll-stopping visuals and copy built around your audience's real pain points — not generic templates that blend into the feed.
services.s5Text: A landing page that converts isn't just pretty — it's built with a precise structure that moves a visitor from interest to action in minutes.
services.s6Text: We launch, monitor, and optimize your campaigns daily — so your budget works harder every week, not just on day one.
services.reportNote: Every 7 days, you receive a detailed performance report — transparent numbers, clear insights, zero fluff.
services.webServiceSubtext: Fast, professional, and optimized for results.
services.webServiceDisclaimer: (Not included in the Lead Gen system — available as a separate service)

results.label: Proof, Not Promises
results.headline: Real businesses. Real numbers.
results.subtext: These are documented results from real clients — different industries, same system, consistent outcomes
results.cta: Get results like these — Book your free call

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.headline: From zero to a full pipeline — in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtext: A proven process we've repeated across industries. It works because every step is built on the one before it.
howItWorks.step1Text: We study your market, your competitors, and your ideal client before touching a single ad.
howItWorks.step2Text: We build the landing page and funnel structure designed to turn visitors into qualified leads.
howItWorks.step3Text: Targeted paid ads go live — reaching the right people with the right message at the right moment.
howItWorks.step4Text: We analyze the data weekly, cut what doesn't work, and scale what does — your results compound over time.

about.label: About ZM Acquisition
about.headline: We don't run ads. We build acquisition machines.
about.name: ZM Acquisition
about.text1: Most agencies hand you a report full of impressions and clicks — and call it success. We don't. We measure success in one currency: qualified clients who show up ready to buy.
about.text2: We've built acquisition systems for Pilates studios, financial coaches, training centers, gyms, and consulting firms. Different industries, same result — a predictable, scalable pipeline that doesn't rely on luck or word of mouth.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.headline: Questions worth answering
faq.subtext: The most common things service business owners ask us before getting started
faq.q1: What makes you different from a regular ad agency?
faq.a1: Most agencies stop at the ad. We build the full system — market research, funnel, landing page, creatives, and campaign management. We don't measure success by clicks. We measure it by clients.
faq.q2: How long before I start seeing results?
faq.a2: The system takes 7 to 14 days to build and launch. Most clients see qualified leads within the first week of going live. Results improve significantly over the first 30 days as we optimize.
faq.q3: What type of businesses do you work with?
faq.a3: We work exclusively with service businesses — gyms, studios, coaches, training centers, consultants, and clinics. If your business depends on a steady flow of clients, this system was built for you.
faq.q4: What advertising budget do I need to get started?
faq.a4: We recommend a minimum of $200/month in ad spend. The budget isn't what drives results — the strategy and funnel behind it do. We've generated hundreds of leads on budgets under $300.

contact.headlinePrefix: Ready to stop guessing and start
contact.subtext: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. We'll analyze your current situation, identify the gaps in your acquisition system, and show you exactly what needs to be built.
contact.benefit2: Full analysis of your current client acquisition situation
contact.benefit3: A clear, actionable plan you can implement immediately
contact.benefit5: Available in Arabic, French, and English
contact.socialProof: Trusted by 50+ service businesses across multiple industries
contact.formSub: Fill in the form and we'll reach out within 24 hours to confirm your session.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.disclaimer: Your information is private and will never be shared with third parties.

reviews.label: Client Reviews
reviews.headline: What happens after the system goes live
reviews.r1Text: Before ZM Acquisition, I was fully dependent on word of mouth. Within 3 weeks of launching the funnel, I had more leads than I could handle. The system just works.
reviews.r2Text: The ROI was visible within the first month. What impressed me most was how targeted the leads were — people who were already interested, not just random clicks.
reviews.r3Text: I've tried other agencies before. The difference here is the funnel — having a landing page that actually converts changed everything. My cost per client dropped by more than half.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At ZM Acquisition, your privacy is not a checkbox — it's a commitment. This policy explains exactly what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.
privacyPage.section1Text: We collect only the information you choose to share with us — typically your name, email address, phone number, and basic business details when you fill out our contact form or book a consultation.
privacyPage.section2Text: Your information is used solely to contact you about your consultation, deliver our services, and improve how we communicate with prospective clients. We do not sell or rent your data.
privacyPage.section3Text: We apply industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. Your data is stored securely and accessed only by our team.
privacyPage.section4Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please reach out to us directly through our contact form.
